mapper.select:
select TPWTD.id, TPWTD.work_ticket_id, TPWTD.cargo_info_id, TPWTD.process_code, TPWTD.process_name, TPWTD.process_detail_code, MWP.PROCESS_NM process_detail_name, TPWTD.dept_id, TPWTD.dept_name, TPWTD.work_date, TPWTD.quantity, TPWTD.ton, TPWTD.remark, TPWTD.allot_type, TPWTD.work_position_code, TPWTD.work_position_name, TPWTD.WORK_DATE, TPWTD.CLASS_NAME, TPWTD.CLASS_CODE, TPWP.id work_plan_id, TPWT.COMPANY_ID, TPWT.COMPANY_NAME, TBT.ID trust_id, TBT.trust_no, to_date(to_char(TPWP.work_date,'yyyy-MM'),'yyyy-MM') work_Date_Check from T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS on TDS.id = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on (TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID and TBT.TYPE in ('卸船','装船')) join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT on TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD on TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on MWP.PROCESS_CD = TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE
where TPWTD.DEPT_NAME!='固机队' and TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE = #{allotType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and TDSI.ID = #{shipVoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TDSI.id "id", TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME "shipStatusName", TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE "shipStatusCode", TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE "dynamicTypeCode", TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME "dynamicTypeName", TDSI.IS_SHIP_CLEAR "isShipClear", TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD "loadUnload" from T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI left join T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC TDSD on TDSI.ID = TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID where TDSI.id = #{shipVoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM set IS_ADJUST = #{status} where id = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM set IS_ADJUST_LABOR = #{status} where id = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM set IS_SHIP_CLEAR = #{isShipClear}, SHIP_PERSON_EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_PERSON_EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_PERSON_EXAMINE_TIME = #{now} where id = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM set IS_SHIP_CLEAR = #{isShipClear}, SHIP_MAC_EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_MAC_EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_MAC_EXAMINE_TIME = #{now} where id = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM set IS_SHIP_CLEAR = '0', SHIP_PERSON_EXAMINE_BY = null, SHIP_PERSON_EXAMINE_BY_NAME = null, SHIP_PERSON_EXAMINE_TIME = null where id = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM set IS_SHIP_CLEAR = '0', SHIP_MAC_EXAMINE_BY = null, SHIP_MAC_EXAMINE_BY_NAME = null, SHIP_MAC_EXAMINE_TIME = null where id = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select distinct tds.ship_name||'_'||TDSI.voyage "shipName", to_char(TPWP.work_date,'yyyy-MM-dd')||'_'|| TPWP.CLASS_NAME||'_'||TPWP.PROCESS_NAME "errorMsg" from T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS on TDS.id = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on (TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID and TBT.TYPE in ('卸船','装船')) join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT on TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID where TPWT.id is null and TDSI.id = #{shipVoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select to_date(to_char(WORK_DATE,'yyyy-MM'),'yyyy-MM') "workDate", case when count(*) >0 then 'N' else 'Y' end "flag" from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL where EXTERNAL_STATUS = '30' and to_char(WORK_DATE,'yyyy-MM') in
to_char(#{workDate},'yyyy-MM') group by to_char(WORK_DATE,'yyyy-MM')
